summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Facebook-style Profile page. All 38 test cases passed. Profile page loads at /profile route with complete Italian Facebook UI. Cover photo with header buttons (menu, pencil, search, more), profile photo with camera icon, name/stats/bio display correctly. Edit profile modal works with Bio, Città attuale, Città natale, Situazione sentimentale fields. All tabs (Tutti, Foto, Reels, Ricordi) are clickable. Dettagli personali, Link, Contact info, Friends, and Posts sections all display correctly. Bottom navigation shows 6 items with profile active.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 422 status - not critical for profile page functionality

integration_issues.issue: Navigates to /create-reel which has no matching route (console shows 'No routes matched location')

action_items: Minor: Add /create-reel route to App.js or update Crea button to navigate to existing /reels/create route
critical_code_review_comments: Profile page uses PROFILE_DATA, FRIENDS_LIST, SAMPLE_POSTS constants for demo display (MOCKED - not fetching from backend API)
All Italian translations are complete and accurate
Edit profile modal properly saves changes to local state with toast confirmation
Bottom navigation correctly shows 6 Facebook-style items with profile active indicator
Options menu properly implements Italian UI with Impostazioni profilo/Visualizza come/Privacy/Archivio options
Crea button navigates to /create-reel but route doesn't exist - should use /reels/create instead
seed_data_creation: None - Profile uses PROFILE_DATA, FRIENDS_LIST, SAMPLE_POSTS constants in component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page fully tested. Uses PROFILE_DATA, FRIENDS_LIST, SAMPLE_POSTS constants for demo (MOCKED). Auth token can be set in localStorage as 'auth_token'. Mobile viewport 430x932 recommended. Bottom navigation has 6 items matching Facebook layout. All Italian translations verified. Edit profile modal works with save functionality. Minor issue: Crea button navigates to non-existent /create-reel route.

mocked_apis_list: Profile data - uses PROFILE_DATA constant in component
Friends - uses FRIENDS_LIST constant in component
Posts - uses SAMPLE_POSTS constant in component
